LanguageData.VFEPD_AbductWarmup.description: This is an effecter prop for "Shambler Raise". Intrinsically laggy, use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AbductWarmup.label: abduct warmup
LanguageData.VFEPD_ArchotechSupport_Large.description: A twisted archotech structure. Inactive and merely decorative.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ArchotechSupport_Large.label: large archotech support
LanguageData.VFEPD_ArchotechSupport_Small.description: A twisted archotech structure. Inactive and merely decorative.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ArchotechSupport_Small.label: archotech support
LanguageData.VFEPD_ArchotechSupport_Vertical.descript: A twisted archotech structure. Inactive and merely decorative.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ArchotechSupport_Vertical.label: vertical archotech support
LanguageData.VFEPD_AtmosphericHeater.description: A thermal projection device powered by scavenged shards of dark archotechnology. Inactive.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AtmosphericHeater.label: atmospheric heater
LanguageData.VFEPD_AtmosphericHeaterLit.description: A thermal projection device powered by scavenged shards of dark archotechnology. Inactive.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AtmosphericHeaterLit.label: atmospheric heater, lit
LanguageData.VFEPD_DecorativeCubeSculture_Dirt.descri: A hastily constructed sculpture resembling a cube.
LanguageData.VFEPD_DecorativeCubeSculture_Dirt.label: decorative cube, dirt
LanguageData.VFEPD_DecorativeCubeSculture_Sand.descri: A hastily constructed sculpture resembling a cube.
LanguageData.VFEPD_DecorativeCubeSculture_Sand.label: decorative cube, sand
LanguageData.VFEPD_DecorativeCubeSculture_Scrap.descr: A hastily constructed sculpture resembling a cube.
LanguageData.VFEPD_DecorativeCubeSculture_Scrap.label: decorative cube, scrap
LanguageData.VFEPD_DecorativeCubeSculture_Stone.descr: A hastily constructed sculpture resembling a cube.
LanguageData.VFEPD_DecorativeCubeSculture_Stone.label: decorative cube, stone
LanguageData.VFEPD_DecorativePlatform.description: A decorative holding platform. Not useful for containment of any kind.
LanguageData.VFEPD_DecorativePlatform.label: decorative platform
LanguageData.VFEPD_EndlessPit2x2c.description: A smooth-sided hole that extends endlessly downwards... Actually, on close inspection it seems to be just painted on the ground...
LanguageData.VFEPD_EndlessPit2x2c.label: fake pit, small
LanguageData.VFEPD_EndlessPit3x2c.description: A smooth-sided hole that extends endlessly downwards... Actually, on close inspection it seems to be just painted on the ground...
LanguageData.VFEPD_EndlessPit3x2c.label: fake pit, medium
LanguageData.VFEPD_EndlessPit3x3c.description: A smooth-sided hole that extends endlessly downwards... Actually, on close inspection it seems to be just painted on the ground...
LanguageData.VFEPD_EndlessPit3x3c.label: fake pit, large
LanguageData.VFEPD_FakeCube.description: Isn't this heresy?? This is heresy, right??
LanguageData.VFEPD_FakeCube.label: fake cube
LanguageData.VFEPD_FakeGrayDoor.description: A non-functional door. It's just two painted plywood panels and won't open. Can be traversed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_FakeGrayDoor.label: fake gray door
LanguageData.VFEPD_FakeHarbingerTree.description: Plastic tree imitating a harbinger tree. No munchies.
LanguageData.VFEPD_FakeHarbingerTree.label: fake harbinger tree
LanguageData.VFEPD_FakeSecurityDoor.description: A non-functional security door. It's just two painted plywood panels and won't open. Can be traversed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_FakeSecurityDoor.label: fake security door
LanguageData.VFEPD_Fleshmassfilth.description: Fleshmass filth. Just like grandma used to make.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Fleshmassfilth.label: fleshmass debris
LanguageData.VFEPD_FloorEtchings.label: floor etchings
LanguageData.VFEPD_GrayBox.description: A strange gray container. It is featureless and the surfaces are smooth. The material is not metal, concrete, or any other identifiable material. Sealed shut.
LanguageData.VFEPD_GrayBox.label: gray box
LanguageData.VFEPD_GrayBox_Empty.description: A strange gray container. It is featureless and the surfaces are smooth. The material is not metal, concrete, or any other identifiable material. Empty.
LanguageData.VFEPD_GrayBox_Empty.label: empty gray box
LanguageData.VFEPD_GrayStatue.description: A strange, twisted sculpture shaped into a disturbing form. It hums gently with some strange internal energy. Merely decorative.
LanguageData.VFEPD_GrayStatue.label: decorative gray statue
LanguageData.VFEPD_InactiveCorruptedObelisk.descripti: A large metallic pillar. Inactive and merely decorative.
LanguageData.VFEPD_InactiveCorruptedObelisk.label: inactive corrupted obelisk
LanguageData.VFEPD_InactiveTwistedObelisk.description: A large metallic pillar. Inactive and merely decorative.
LanguageData.VFEPD_InactiveTwistedObelisk.label: inactive twisted obelisk
LanguageData.VFEPD_InactiveWarpedObelisk.description: A large metallic pillar. Inactive and merely decorative.
LanguageData.VFEPD_InactiveWarpedObelisk.label: inactive warped obelisk
LanguageData.VFEPD_LooseGround.label: loose ground
LanguageData.VFEPD_MetalhorrorDebris.label: metalhorror debris
LanguageData.VFEPD_NociosphereDeparting.description: This is an effecter prop for "Nociosphere Departing". Intrinsically laggy, use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_NociosphereDeparting.label: nociosphere departing
LanguageData.VFEPD_Noctolith.description: A twisted pillar of jagged blade-like structures made of dark, oily metal. Merely decorative.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Noctolith.label: noctolith
LanguageData.VFEPD_PitBurrow.description: A small hole connecting to some unseen cave network deep under the surface... Actually, on close inspection it seems to be just painted on the ground...
LanguageData.VFEPD_PitBurrow.label: fake pit burrow
LanguageData.VFEPD_PitGate.description: A massive, foreboding hole that connects the surface with a dark network of underground caves... Actually, on close inspection it seems to be just painted on the ground...
LanguageData.VFEPD_PitGate.label: pit gate
LanguageData.VFEPD_RevenantGorePool.description: Revenant gore pool. Smells like raspberries.
LanguageData.VFEPD_RevenantGorePool.label: revenant gore pool
LanguageData.VFEPD_RevenantSmear.description: Revenant smear. That's the name of my black metal band.
LanguageData.VFEPD_RevenantSmear.label: revenant smear
LanguageData.VFEPD_ShamblerRaise.description: This is an effecter prop for "Shambler Raise". Intrinsically laggy, use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ShamblerRaise.label: shambler raise
LanguageData.VFEPD_TachycardiacArrest.description: This is an effecter prop for "Tachycardiac Arrest". Intrinsically laggy, use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_TachycardiacArrest.label: tachycardiac arrest
LanguageData.VFEPD_TwistedFlesh.label: twisted flesh
LanguageData.VFEPD_VoidSculpture.description: An unsettling sculpture made from bioferrite. Inactive and merely decorative.
LanguageData.VFEPD_VoidSculpture.label: decorative void sculpture
LanguageData.VFEPD_VoidStructure.description: A warped structure made of jagged oily metallic-like pieces. Inactive and merely decorative.
LanguageData.VFEPD_VoidStructure.label: void structure
LanguageData.VFEPD_VoidStructureLit.description: A warped structure made of jagged oily metallic-like pieces. Inactive and merely decorative.
LanguageData.VFEPD_VoidStructureLit.label: void structure, lit
